who: hospitality operations managers in restaurants processing 5–15 maintenance logs/month
offer: For hospitality operations managers in restaurants processing 5–15 maintenance logs/month, inconsistent tracking causes unexpected equipment failures. We provide a digital log solution instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or paper logs.
problem: Inconsistent tracking of kitchen equipment maintenance leads to unexpected equipment failures.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hospitality operations managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to hospitality operations managers with demo video
Community forums where hospitality operations managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of maintenance logs for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing maintenance data
